items.definition_en: A cent is one hundredth of a dollar or euro.
items.example_en: I found a cent on the street.

items.definition_en: A quarter is a coin worth twenty-five cents.
items.example_en: He paid with a quarter for the drink.

items.definition_en: A nickel is a coin worth five cents.
items.example_en: I need one more nickel for the bus ticket.

items.definition_en: A dime is a coin worth ten cents.
items.example_en: She gave me a dime for the phone call.

items.definition_en: A note is a piece of paper money.
items.example_en: He paid with a ten-dollar note.

items.definition_en: A coin is a small, round piece of metal money.
items.example_en: I have a coin in my pocket.

items.definition_en: A banknote is a piece of paper money used to pay for things.
items.example_en: The cashier checked the banknote.

items.definition_en: Change is the money you get back after paying more than the price.
items.example_en: She gave me change after my purchase.

items.definition_en: A penny is a coin worth one cent in the US and one pence in the UK.
items.example_en: He found a penny on the sidewalk.

items.definition_en: A half-dollar is a coin worth fifty cents.
items.example_en: This half-dollar coin is very shiny.

items.definition_en: A bill is a piece of paper money in the US.
items.example_en: He handed the waiter a five-dollar bill.

items.definition_en: A tenner is a ten-pound note in the UK.
items.example_en: She paid for lunch with a tenner.

items.definition_en: A fiver is a five-pound note in the UK.
items.example_en: He gave me a fiver for my birthday.

items.definition_en: A loonie is a one-dollar coin in Canada.
items.example_en: The vending machine only takes loonies.

items.definition_en: A toonie is a two-dollar coin in Canada.
items.example_en: She put a toonie in the parking meter.

items.definition_en: Small change means coins of low value.
items.example_en: I keep small change in my purse.

items.definition_en: A copper is a coin made mostly from copper, usually of small value.
items.example_en: He dropped a copper on the floor.

items.definition_en: A roll of coins is a group of coins wrapped together.
items.example_en: The bank gave him a roll of coins.

items.definition_en: A silver coin is a coin made of silver or silver-colored metal.
items.example_en: The old chest held a silver coin.

items.definition_en: A banknote printer is a machine that prints money notes.
items.example_en: The new banknote printer is very fast.
